nodes.label: P2.5 synth — accuracy vs backward-weight cost (little headroom to buy)
nodes.rationale: pure-SCFF sits at (~33k,0.923), essentially matching the GD ceiling (0.963); read N2/N4/N8 (0.919/0.914/0.906) and write N2/N4/N8 (0.905/0.897/0.890) all sit at or below pure-SCFF despite added backward cost -- on synth there is no cheap accuracy to buy because SCFF alone is already near-ceiling.
